about.title: A professional academic homepage without the clutter.
about.body:
I am a demo researcher using this template to present publications, projects, service, teaching, and contact information. Replace this text with your own short biography, current affiliation, and research interests.

The template is static enough for GitHub Pages, but structured enough to regenerate publications, keyword clouds, and photo galleries from local data files.

My curriculum vitae.
education.title: Academic pathway.
service.title: Academic and professional activities.
service.review: Reviewer for selected journals and conferences in robotics, machine learning, and computer vision.
service.teaching: Instructor or teaching assistant for machine learning, deep learning, robotics, or AI courses.
service.demos: Research demonstrations, tutorials, open-source releases, and project websites.
service.supervision: Mentoring undergraduate, master, or doctoral students on research projects.
contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.affiliation: Department of Computer Science, Example University
footer.note: Built from the Academic Portfolio Template.
publications.title: Publications
publications.intro: A generated list of journal articles, conference papers, and workshop papers. For the latest updates, please check Google Scholar.
cv.title: CV
cv.intro: A scrollable CV page rendered from SVG pages. Replace the demo SVGs in images/cv-pages with your exported CV pages.
life.title: Photo Drops
life.intro: A public photo gallery generated from files in images/oc. Replace these placeholders with your own public images and rerun npm run build:life.
blog.title: Blog
blog.intro: A Markdown workspace for technical notes, paper stories, experiment logs, and visual essays. The tab is hidden from the main navigation until you decide to publish writing.
